# INNotebookItemType.note

**Case**

A note item type.

## Declaration

```swift
case note
```

## Discussion

Search your app’s notes and return each one using an [doc://com.apple.sirikit/documentation/Intents/INNote] object.

## Enumeration Cases

- **INNotebookItemType.unknown**: An unknown type of item.
- **INNotebookItemType.taskList**: A task list item type.
- **INNotebookItemType.task**: A task item type.
title: INNotebookItemType.note
